title: Toughook Original Rainbow Coat Rail – 6 Hook Rack - Wall-Mounted Colourful Pegs, Tough Heavy Duty Hook for Clothes, Bag, Hat & Towel, Durable. Child-Friendly Design for School, Home & Office
features: Super Strong & Durable: Built with an ABS shell laminate MDF, this coat rack features 6x rainbow coloured unbreakable Toughook Original hooks (120mm x 32mm x 16mm) designed to handle heavy coats, bags, and more with ease.

Perfect Fit Spacing: Hooks are evenly spaced at 110mm apart, with 55mm at each rail end. Join multiple rails seamlessly to create a continuous, consistent look for larger spaces like schools and offices.
Space-Saving Double Hooks: Equipped with 6x double hooks, this coat rack maximizes hanging space for hats, coats, bags, umbrellas, towels, robes, and keys, keeping your space tidy and organized.
Child-Friendly & Safe: Smooth, rounded hooks and a vibrant rainbow design make it safer than metal options, ideal for classrooms, nurseries, and homes with children while adding a colourful touch.
Easy to Install: Designed for wall installation, this coat rack fits securely and provides a modern, durable solution for organizing corridors, hallways, bedrooms, bathrooms, garages, and more.
description: Product Description 4x Useful Sizes : Toughook ONE, MINI, Original & XL Largest range of colours 100s of Genuine Reviews “I am pleased to state that I highly recommend Toughooks as they are truly very tough. We have installed them in our school for the past 3 years to replace aluminium hooks which the kids broke very quickly and easily. Not a single Toughook has been destroyed.” Simon F. Verified Reviewer Precision Injection moulded with Super Tough Nylon PA6 Volume Discounts Available TOUGHOOK Unbreakable Plastic Coat Hooks SAFER - STRONGER - BETTER Toughooks are the number 1 Unbreakable Plastic Coat Hook. Engineered to last a lifetime, Toughooks are the best way to improve the look, safety and longevity of your coat rails and cloakrooms. Original UK designs, Toughooks are manufactured using Super Tough nylon polymer. With no weak metal to break or bend, Toughooks safely hold anything you need, year after year ! Perfect for Nurseries, Schools, Workplaces and your Home. No more injuries from protruding hooks - the Toughook has a flat curve profile No more annual hook replacements - the Toughooks are unbreakable No more boring silver - the Toughook comes in 20 colours for you to mix and match however you like ! Toughooks are an Original Design. Manufactured in the United Kingdom Toughook ONE Sometimes you just need a hook. You just want a hook that won't break, won't injure anybody and looks great. Meet the Toughook One. With just a single hook (versus the two hooks of our other designs) this Toughook is incredible versatile and can be made to fit into tight gaps where two hooks just won't work. Often used in tandem with our Toughook Mini (it shares many of the same dimensions) these come in 20 superb colours (just like the Originals and Minis, so you can match them). Toughook MINI Toughook Mini is a slightly smaller version of our original Toughook. These Toughooks come in 20 amazing colours and are engineered to be unbreakable - for life. The Toughook Mini is 95mm tall overall (25mm smaller overall than our original hook), with a 55mm rear edge. Toughook Original Unbreakable and Eye Level Safe, the Toughook is the best way to improve the look, safety and longevity of your coat rails and cloakrooms. Toughook Original hooks are 120mm in overall height, with an 80mm flat back edge. Toughook XL The Toughook XL is the perfect choice when you need to be able to hang bags, coats and everything in between. The larger size of the hook makes it ideal for accommodating bulky backpacks and coats. The Toughook XL hook measures 138mm top to bottom (though with the same 80mm rear edge as our Original Toughook: ideal for most coat rail or batten attachments) and 20mm wide. The large size of this hook lets it hold much bulkier items than our Original or Mini Toughooks. Our Toughook XL is a full size hook and far far larger than any other 'unbreakable hook' on the market. Neutral colours to suit any project Toughooks are available in neutral colours as well. Sometimes you just need a neutral colour for your project, we offer each size of Toughook in Black, Graphite, Dark Grey, Mid Grey, Light Grey and White. Ideal for offices and general workplaces. You can purchase individual neutral colour Packs, or opt for a 'Shades of Grey' Pack from our listings. PerfectFit Coat Rails Every hook is perfectly and consistently spaced, even when joining two or more rails together. Hooks are spaced 110mm from each other and 55mm from each end of the rails. So when two rails are joined the spacing is exactly the same, allowing you to create seamless runs of any length.
